title: Deputy Manager
department: Overseas Operations & Strategy Div. Systems & Data Analytics Dept.
summary: Transferred within the HD Renewables group to its subsidiary Star Trade while retaining the Deputy Manager role. Leads engineering for overseas power trading — market data, bidding systems, and the planning of automated trading modules.
responsibilities: Lead development of overseas power-trading and market-data systems together with the team
Build bidding and tender systems for overseas electricity markets
Plan and architect automated trading modules
Drive the trading data platform's evolution across the corporate group
achievements: Transferred within the HD Renewables group to Star Trade while retaining the Deputy Manager role

title: Deputy Manager
summary: Moved onto the management track as Deputy Manager and kicked off the power-trading data platform — a centralized system that ingests Japan's electricity market and weather data to underpin trading and forecasting.
responsibilities: Designed and led development of a power-trading data platform from the ground up
Built ingestion for Japanese electricity-market data (JEPX) and meteorological data feeds
Defined the data model and architecture powering price forecasting and trading analytics
Coordinated the engineering team while shaping the platform roadmap
achievements: Transitioned from an individual contributor to a management role
Launched the foundation of the trading data platform consolidating market and weather data

title: Principal Engineer
summary: Promoted to Principal Engineer, taking technical ownership of the international power-trading strategy stack — the spot-price prediction models and the data pipelines feeding the Japan and Australia trading desks.
responsibilities: Led development of spread and spot-price prediction models for the Japan and Australia power markets
Set the technical direction for the trading data pipeline and model-serving infrastructure
Mentored engineers and reviewed designs across the trading platform
Partnered with traders to turn market requirements into production tooling
achievements: Promoted from Senior Engineer to Principal Engineer within the International Power Trading Division
Hardened the spot-market prediction pipeline into a reliable daily production service

title: Senior Engineer
summary: Transferred to the International Power Trading Division, focusing on developing power trading strategies for Japan and Australia markets. Developing spread strategy models to predict spot market electricity prices and assist traders in decision-making.
responsibilities: Develop international power trading strategies for Japan and Australia markets
Create spread strategy models for predicting spot market electricity prices
Support traders with data-driven decision-making tools
Apply technical solutions to real trading scenarios to support overseas market expansion
achievements: Developed spot market prediction model for electronic trading strategies

title: Senior Engineer
summary: Developed solar power prediction and display systems, optimized power matching algorithms, and integrated various platforms with advanced authentication systems.
responsibilities: Developed time series models using Python and PyTorch to predict solar power generation for Tainan FamilyMart Pingfeng store energy storage demonstration site
Implemented scheduled data extraction and processing using Airflow, pushing load and generation data to display dashboards
Optimized power matching algorithms in collaboration with ITRI, reducing computational complexity from O(N⁴) to O(N³) using MaxFlow algorithm
Integrated optimized algorithms into power matching platform backend using Django REST APIs
Implemented asynchronous computing with token system and email notifications for better UX
Developed third-party login (SSO) functionality integrating Microsoft Azure AD and Google login
achievements: Successfully deployed solar power prediction system for demonstration site
Improved algorithm efficiency by 25% through optimization
Enhanced platform security and user experience with SSO integration

title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Developed NLP and data platforms using Python and deep learning frameworks. Built sentiment analysis platform processing over 3 billion data points with 30% accuracy improvement. Led backend development for dashboard projects and CDP platforms.
responsibilities: Developed sentiment analysis platform using deep learning frameworks, improving accuracy by 30%
Built distributed services using Docker to process large-scale daily crawler data stored in Elasticsearch
Established automated DevOps for public opinion data analysis and push notification mechanisms
Developed internal data management and annotation tools
Created various public opinion monitoring dashboards based on different business requirements
Implemented CDP platform using FastAPI and Elasticsearch for cross-website user identification services
achievements: Processed over 3 billion data points through sentiment analysis platform
Achieved 30% improvement in model accuracy compared to previous solutions
Successfully deployed scalable microservices architecture handling high API traffic

title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Worked on cybersecurity products, focusing on CA certificate applications and writing comprehensive test cases for security systems.
responsibilities: Developed test cases for cybersecurity-related products
Worked on CA certificate applications and implementations
Ensured product quality through comprehensive testing procedures
achievements: Developed comprehensive test suite for TSA (Time Stamping Authority)
Successfully implemented certificate-based security products

title: Image Processing Software Engineer
summary: Specialized in computer vision and deep learning solutions. Developed AI applications for medical imaging, retail analytics, and embedded advertising systems using edge computing devices.
responsibilities: Applied Docker virtualization technology to simplify development processes
Developed automated MRI/PET brain medical image AC-PC correction preprocessing solutions
Created AI image recognition applications on Nvidia Jetson edge devices with system integration
Developed fisheye camera conversion algorithms for human pose recognition applications
Built and integrated AI product frontend and backend architectures
achievements: Developed AI solution for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis using MRI/PET brain image processing
Created human pose recognition system for fisheye cameras improving narrow space monitoring
Built heat map detection system for retail stores optimizing product exposure
Implemented embedded advertising recommendation system detecting crowd demographics

title: Software and AI Engineer
summary: First professional role developing web scraping and data analysis platforms. Built NLP models, voice recognition systems, and blockchain-related applications using various technologies.
responsibilities: Developed frontend and backend web applications and microservices for blockchain trend products
Created web scraping programs for major social media platforms (Twitter, Facebook, Telegram) using Selenium
Built and managed public opinion analysis databases using MySQL
Developed MySQL database remote backup and synchronization systems
Created AI content classification technology for voice assistants
Built AI Chinese reading comprehension online services
Developed text and speech annotation platform systems
achievements: Built ICO sentiment analysis platform 'Rating Token & Coin Master' with integrated NLP models
Developed Taiwanese Hokkien song recognition model for voice-controlled smart speakers
Created comprehensive data annotation platform for Chinese reading comprehension and Taiwanese speech recognition models
